visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie, with a wire earpiece, stands in a dimly lit room. He has his eyes closed and a pained expression on his face. The camera pulls back to reveal a control room with several people working at computer stations in the background.
audio_description: A high-pitched, electronic beeping sound, similar to a heart monitor, is audible.
